title: Bipolar & Lithium Mastery
content:
• Dx: Manic Episode: Sleeping little (>1wk), pressured speech.
• Risk: Lithium Toxicity: Precipitated by Advil (NSAIDs). Use Aspirin.
• Tx: Dialysis if Level >4.

title: Personality Disorders
content:
• Cluster A (Weird): Paranoid (Accusatory), Schizoid (Aloof).
• Cluster B (Wild): Antisocial (Bad), Borderline (Instability), Histrionic.
• Cluster C (Worried): Avoidant, OCPD (Compulsive).

title: APGAR & Birth Injuries
content:
• Dx: APGAR: 1 min (tolerance), 5 min (resuscitation). NOT a neuro predictor.
• Dx: Erb-Duchenne (C5-C6): Waiters tip position.
• Tx: Clavicular Fracture: No tx needed.

title: Celiac Disease Basics
content:
• Dx: Diarrhea + abdominal distention in thin child.
• Tx: Strict gluten-free diet.

title: Consent & Refusal
content:
• Rule: Do not override capable adult refusal (e.g. Jehovah Witness).
• Rule: Mature Minor is capacity-based in Canada.

title: Dermatology High-Yield
content:
• Dx: Tinea versicolor: Hypopigmented patches (Malassezia furfur).
• Tx: Scabies: Permethrin cream for patient and family.
• Dx: Tinea Capitis: Broken hairs in localized hair loss.
